inputs.label: Current Interest Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: The prevailing market interest rate for the reference period.

businessContext_i18n.en: The prevailing market interest rate for the reference period.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Referans dönemi için geçerli piyasa faiz oranı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der vorherrschende Marktzinssatz für den Referenzzeitraum.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le taux d'intérêt en vigueur sur le marché pour la période de référence.
businessContext_i18n.es: La tasa de interés vigente en el mercado para el período de referencia.

inputs.label: Expected Rate Change (bps)
inputs.businessContext: Anticipated shift in interest rate in basis points (1 bps = 0.01%).

businessContext_i18n.en: Anticipated shift in interest rate in basis points (1 bps = 0.01%).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Baz puan cinsinden beklenen faiz değişimi (1 bps = %0,01).
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwartete Verschiebung des Zinssatzes in Basispunkten (1 BP = 0,01 %).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Changement anticipé du taux d'intérêt en points de base (1 pdb = 0,01 %).
businessContext_i18n.es: Cambio anticipado en la tasa de interés en puntos básicos (1 pbs = 0,01%).

inputs.label: Portfolio Value (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Total notional value of the fixed-income portfolio.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total notional value of the fixed-income portfolio.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sabit getirili portföyün toplam nominal değeri.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur notionnelle totale du portefeuille à revenu fixe.
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor nocional total de la cartera de renta fija.

inputs.label: Modified Duration (years)
inputs.businessContext: Sensitivity of bond price to yield changes, adjusted for yield.

businessContext_i18n.en: Sensitivity of bond price to yield changes, adjusted for yield.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tahvil fiyatının getiri değişimlerine duyarlılığı, getiriye göre düzeltilmiş.
businessContext_i18n.de: Sensitivität des Anleihepreises gegenüber Renditeänderungen, angepasst an die Rendite.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Sensibilité du prix des obligations aux variations de rendement, ajustée pour le rendement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Sensibilidad del precio del bono a cambios en el rendimiento, ajustada por rendimiento.

inputs.label: Convexity
inputs.businessContext: Second-order measure of curvature in price-yield relationship.

businessContext_i18n.en: Second-order measure of curvature in price-yield relationship.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Fiyat-getiri ilişkisindeki eğriliğin ikinci derece ölçüsü.
businessContext_i18n.de: Maß zweiter Ordnung für die Krümmung der Preis-Rendite-Beziehung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Mesure de second ordre de la courbure de la relation prix-rendement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Medida de segundo orden de la curvatura en la relación precio-rendimiento.

inputs.label: Hedge Ratio (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of portfolio hedged using derivatives or swaps.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of portfolio hedged using derivatives or swaps.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Türev veya swap kullanılarak korunan portföy yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz des Portfolios, der mit Derivaten oder Swaps abgesichert ist.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage du portefeuille couvert par des dérivés ou swaps.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de la cartera cubierto mediante derivados o swaps.

inputs.label: Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Statistical confidence for VaR and tail risk estimation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Statistical confidence for VaR and tail risk estimation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: VaR ve kuyruk risk tahmini için istatistiksel güven.
businessContext_i18n.de: Statistisches Konfidenzniveau für VaR- und Tail-Risk-Schätzung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Confiance statistique pour l'estimation de la VaR et du risque de queue.
businessContext_i18n.es: Confianza estadística para la estimación del VaR y riesgo de cola.

inputs.label: Volatility Regime
inputs.businessContext: Market volatility environment for stress testing.

businessContext_i18n.en: Market volatility environment for stress testing.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Stres testi için piyasa volatilite ortamı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Environnement de volatilité du marché pour les tests de résistance.
businessContext_i18n.es: Entorno de volatilidad del mercado para pruebas de estrés.

rules.message: Convexity is unusually low relative to duration. Verify inputs.
Hedge ratio must be between 0% and 100%.
Extreme volatility regime typically requires rate change > 100 bps.

thresholds.message: Projected loss exceeds 5% of portfolio value. Immediate review recommended.
Low convexity amplifies risk under large rate shifts.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
